exercises.solution:
Use the number line to order:
$$-5 < -4 < -1 < 0 < 2 < 3$$
hints: Place each number on the number line
Negative numbers are all less than zero

exercises.solution:
$-3 > -8$

Reason: On the number line, $-3$ is to the right of $-8$, so $-3$ is greater.
hints: Place both numbers on the number line
Right is greater, left is lesser

exercises.prompt: Solve: $2x < 10$. State the solution as an inequality.
exercises.solution:
Divide both sides by 2:
$$2x < 10$$
$$x < 5$$

The solution is all numbers less than 5. On a number line, this is everything to the LEFT of 5.
hints: Divide both sides by the coefficient
The inequality sign does NOT flip (you divided by positive 2)
The solution is a range of numbers
